case_title: JAVIER SILVA BERMUDEZ VS. OSCAR RIVAS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,600.00 FILED BY SILVA BERMUDEZ, JAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT RIVAS, OSCAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SILVA BERMUDEZ, JAVIER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED JUL-29-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RIVAS, OSCAR
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SILVA BERMUDEZ, JAVIER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-08-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-08-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF JAVIER SILVA BERMUDEZ APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT OSCAR RIVAS. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILVA BERMUDEZ, JAVIER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVAS, OSCAR $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $320.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,920.00, DEFENDANT OWES PLAINTIFF $1600 IN UNPAID PRINCIPAL AND $320 IN INTEREST (AT 10% PER YEAR) FOR A TOTAL OF $1920.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
